## Checklist

- [ ] My change follows [docs/coding-standards.md](https://github.com/Quelora/quelora/blob/main/docs/coding-standards.md).
- [ ] Docs / README updated where relevant.
- [ ] Commit messages are descriptive (`feat(area): …`, `fix(area): …` style appreciated).
- [ ] Multi-tenancy preserved — every new query filters by `cid`.
